## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and reversible.
- [ ] Tests or docs were updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally.
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally when package output is affected.
- [ ] No secrets, private URLs, cookies, or internal API data were added.
